Work — AI Art, Music, UI/UX · Lab

About the artist

TØX!Q

A multidisciplinary artist working across digital and traditional media. My work investigates the tension between the constructed and the organic—light as material, shadow as language.

Each piece begins with observation—a quality of light through glass, a texture remembered in childhood, a feeling without a name. The studio is a laboratory where intuition and technique negotiate in the dark.

0 Years creating
